column8: orig batch-loads 5 pic*.tga via LoadFrontendTgaSurfaceFromArchive; port frontend_load_bg_gallery loads PNGs via td5_asset_load_png_to_buffer + td5_plat_render_upload_texture (D3D11). Manifest @ td5_frontend.c:10486

orig ReleaseTrackedFrontendSurface loop over 5 DDraw slide handles; port collapses release path - PNGs/textures retained until td5_frontend_release_resources. Comment @ td5_frontend.c:8216 acknowledges collapse

orig loads Fear_Factory/Gravity_Kills/Junkie_XL/KMFDM/PitchShifter band TGAs for MusicTestExtras screen; port Screen_MusicTestExtras (td5_frontend.c:8210) renders text-only overlay - no band images loaded. Comment @ 8216

orig rand-pick non-dup slide + DDraw vtbl[100] Lock + rand x in [0x8c..0x8c+500-w] y in [0x54..0x54+0x150]; port frontend_advance_bg_gallery preserves rand+pos math (140/84/500/336 constants cited inline) drops DDraw lock

orig CrossFade16BitSurfaces + Copy16BitSurfaceRect 16bpp per-scanline alpha math triggered at phase -0x18; port frontend_render_bg_gallery uses TD5_PRESET_TRANSLUCENT_LINEAR fe_draw_quad with computed alpha factor preserving -24 advance trigger
